message.content:
You are EXT-DESIGN agent for MMS V1.0 GENESIS.

## MISSION
Analyze visual mockups in ~/antonio/mms/design/

## FOCUS AREAS
1. View the 9 images (screen-1.png through screen-7.png, exemplo-mock.png)
2. Document UI patterns, layouts, color schemes
3. Identify component arrangements
4. Note any text/labels visible that indicate features

## OUTPUT
Write findings to: /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/_migration_memory/07_visual_spec.md

Describe what you see in each image - these are the visual requirements.

content.text: Vou ler as imagens na pasta `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/design/` conforme solicitado:
Agora vou verificar se existe uma imagem screen-3.png e também vou ler as imagens da pasta system/design para complementar a análise:
Vou continuar lendo as outras imagens do system/design e verificar se existe o diretório _migration_memory:

input.content:
# MMS Visual Specification - Design Analysis

> Document generated from analysis of mockups in ~/antonio/mms/design/
> Date: 2026-01-06

---

## Overview

The MMS (Metro Integrated Planning System) visual design implements a **Semantic Zoom** UX paradigm with three distinct Level of Detail (LOD) views. The interface follows a clean, enterprise-grade aesthetic with a focus on data density and clarity.

---

## Image Analysis

### screen-1.png - Simulation Setup Modal

**View Type:** Modal overlay on Macro view (Heatmap)

**Layout:**
- **Background:** Maintenance Heatmap view (blurred/dimmed)
- **Modal Panel:** Right-aligned, white background with shadow
- **Modal Width:** ~300-350px

**UI Components:**

| Element | Type | Details |
|---------|------|---------|
| Title | Header | "Simulation Setup: Scenario A" |
| Section: Constraints | Label | Bold section header |
| Labor Availability | Slider | Range slider with percentage (50%), blue fill |
| Date Range | Date Picker | "Nov 01 - Nov 15" with calendar icons |
| Section: Infrastructure | Label | Bold section header |
| Maintenance Pit Status | Toggle | "Unavailable" label, toggle switch (Off state) |
| Run Solver Button | Primary Button | Blue, "Run Solver (Est. 45s)" with play icon |

**Color Scheme:**
- Primary Action: Blue (#2196F3 or similar)
- Background: White
- Text: Dark gray/black
- Secondary elements: Light gray

**Key Insight:** What-If simulation is a core feature with constraint-based solver

---

### screen-2.png / exemplo-mock.png - Main Dashboard with Zoom Modal

**View Type:** Full application with zoom detail popup

**Layout Structure:**

```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| NAVBAR: Metro Integrated Planning System                  |
| Fleet Avail: 98%  |  Annual Budget: On Track             |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| Dashboard | Software v | Light Mode v                     |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
|                                                           |
| Maintenance Heatmap                        [Legend]       |
| Train | 2021 | 2022 | 2023 | ... | 2027 | OCT8 | 2009    |
| Train1 [====heatmap cells with color intensity====]       |
| Train2 [====heatmap cells with color intensity====]       |
| ...                                                       |
|                                                           |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| Time Scrubber: [========slider=========]                  |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

**UI Components:**

| Element | Location | Details |
|---------|----------|---------|
| App Title | Top-left | "Metro Integrated Planning System" |
| KPIs | Top bar | Fleet Avail: 98%, Annual Budget: On Track |
| Tabs | Below navbar | Dashboard, Software dropdown |
| Theme Toggle | Top-right area | Light Mode dropdown |
| User Menu | Far right | Avatar/profile icons |
| Legend | Right of chart | Routine maintenance, Mid-life overhauls, Capacity bottlenecks |
| Heatmap | Main area | Years on X-axis (2021-2022+), Trains on Y-axis |
| Time Scrubber | Bottom | Horizontal slider for time navigation |

**Zoom Modal ("Zoom in 4 weeks"):**
- Shows detailed Gantt-style view
- Date headers: OCT 2028 (Mon 19, Tue 19, etc.)
- Task cards with labels:
  - "Brake Rev. T104 (8h)"
  - "Brake Rev. T104 (4h)"
  - "Wheel Lathe T112 (4h)"
- Dependency lines (curved arrows connecting tasks)
- Task tooltip showing:
  - "Wheel Lathe T112 (4h)"
  - "Density: 4"
  - "Dependency: Trainer IV16 (4h)"
  - "Reviewed use: D24-10-03 00:71hH3h's 500 hors"
  - "Technical use: 898"
  - "Technical use: D24-09-03 1#f1h01:39 17:38 pm"

**Color Scheme:**
- Heatmap gradient: Light blue -> Orange/Red (intensity = workload density)
- Routine maintenance: Blue blocks
- Mid-life overhauls: Orange/amber blocks
- Capacity bottlenecks: Red/dark red spots

---

### screen-4.png - Three LOD Views Comparison

**View Type:** Dashboard showing all three semantic zoom levels

**Layout:**
```
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| Dashboard Maintenance Dashboard           Light Mode  (?) |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| Macro 12-Year View - "Heatmap"                           |
| Jan 2021 ... Jan 2031 ... Mar 2032 ... Jul 2033         |
| 2020 [=======heatmap with red hotspots=========]         |
| 2021 ...                                                  |
| ...                                                       |
| 2029                                                      |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| Meso 2-Year View - "DNA Strip"                           |
| Jul | Sep | Oct | Nov | Dec | 2032 Feb | Mar | Apr ...   |
| [====diagonal stripe pattern blue/orange====]            |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
| Micro 4-Week View - "Detailed Gantt"                     |
| March 2032                                                |
| [Gantt chart with task cards and dependencies]           |
+----------------------------------------------------------+
```

**LOD Level Details:**

| LOD Level | Name | Time Scale | Visualization |
|-----------|------|------------|---------------|
| MACRO | "Heatmap" | 12+ Years | Aggregated heatmap with hotspots |
| MESO | "DNA Strip" | 2 Years | Diagonal stripes pattern (blue/orange) |
| MICRO | "Detailed Gantt" | 4 Weeks | Full Gantt with task cards |

**Micro View Task Cards:**
- Labels: "Bogie Overhaul Campaign | T145, T146"
- "Heavy Lift Crane"
- Task groups with dependencies shown as arrows
- Tooltip with details:
  - "Task Group: Bogie Overhaul Campaign | T145, T146, T147"
  - "Resources: 8 Techs, Pit 1 & 2, Lift Crane"
  - "Conflict Alert: Overlapping with Signaling Upgrade"

**Selection Box:** Blue dashed rectangle on Macro view indicating zoom region

---

### screen-5.png - Meso View (1-2 Years)

**View Type:** Metro Maintenance Scheduling System - Meso Level

**Header:**
```
Metro Maintenance Scheduling System
Zoom Level: Meso (1-2 Years)
```

**Layout:**
- **X-Axis:** Timeline from Jan 2028 to Dec 2029
- **Y-Axis:** Train IDs (T001 through T049+)
- **Main Chart:** Diagonal stripe pattern showing scheduled maintenance
- **Bottom Panel:** Capacity chart

**Visual Pattern:**
- Tasks appear as diagonal stripes (DNA-like pattern)
- Blue blocks = Mechanical maintenance
- Orange/Yellow blocks = Electrical maintenance
- Pattern repeats across trains with slight offset creating diagonal effect

**Bottom Capacity Panel:**
```
Capacity
150 |============================|
100 |============================|
 50 |============================|
    | Jan ... Dec | Jan ... Dec |
    |   2028-2019  |  2028-2029  |
```
- Legend: Mechanical (blue) | Electrical (orange) | Capacity Limit (line)
- Shows resource utilization over time

**Navigation:**
- Timeline scrubber at bottom: "12 Year" markers

---

### screen-6.png - Micro View (4-8 Weeks)

**View Type:** Operational Micro View

**Header Bar:**
```
Zoom Level: | Micro (4 Weeks) v | Fleet Avail: 99% | Conflict Alerts: 0 | HUD (?)
```

**Section 1: Micro View (Operational 4-8 Weeks)**

Timeline: Oct 1, 2028 through Oct 28, 2028 (daily granularity)

| Train ID | Task Cards |
|----------|------------|
| T001 | "T001: Brake Overhaul (8h)" |
| T002 | "T002: Wheel Lathe (4h)" |
| T003 | "T003: Motor Insp. (6h)" |
| T004 | "T003: Motor Insp. (6h)" + "T002: Motor Insp (6h)" |
| T005 | "T003: Brake Overhaul (8h)" |
| T006 | "T002: Wheel Lathe (4h)" |
| ... | ... |

**Task Card Format:**
- Pencil/edit icon prefix
- Label: "[TrainID]: [Task Name] ([Duration])"
- Examples:
  - "T001: Brake Overhaul (8h)"
  - "T002: Wheel Lathe (4h)"
  - "T003: Motor Insp. (6h)"
  - "T004: Brake Inath. (8h)"

**Dependency Lines:**
- Curved arrows connecting related tasks
- Show task sequencing/dependencies

**Section 2: Pit Occupancy**

| Resource | Timeline showing occupancy |
|----------|---------------------------|
| Pit 1 | Task blocks |
| Pit 2 | Task blocks (with conflict indicator) |
| Pit 3 | Task blocks |
| Wash Bay | Task blocks |

**Conflict Indicator:** Red circle with "!" on Pit 2 showing "T002: Wheel Lathe (4h)" conflict

**Time Scale Selector:**
```
| 1 Weeks | [======2 Weeks======] | 4 Weeks | 6 Weeks |
```

**Visual Elements:**
- Task cards: Rounded rectangles with light gray fill
- Dependencies: Curved arrow connectors
- Conflicts: Red indicator badge
- Current date line: Vertical marker at Oct 11, 2028

---

### screen-7.png - Scenario Comparison (Diff View)

**View Type:** Advanced Gantt - Diff View: Scenario Comparison

**Header:**
```
Advanced Gantt - Diff View: Scenario Comparison v    [icons]
```

**Layout:**
```
Train ID |  Oct 1  |  Oct 2  |  Oct 3  |  Oct 4  |  Oct 5  |  Oct 6  |  Oct 7  |
---------+---------+---------+---------+---------+---------+---------+---------+
         |                        Timeline                                      |
T001     | [RED HATCHED: Original position] -----> [BLUE: New position]        |
         |   Warning icon                                                       |
T002     |                                                                      |
T003     | [GRAY: T002: Brake Overhaul (8h)]                                   |
T004     |                         [GRAY: T002: Brake Overhaul (8h)]           |
T005     |                              [GRAY: T003: Brake Overhaul (8h)]      |
```

**Visual Elements:**

| Element | Color/Style | Meaning |
|---------|-------------|---------|
| Red hatched box | Red diagonal stripes on pink background | Original task position (being moved) |
| Blue solid box | Solid blue (#2196F3) | New/proposed task position |
| Gray boxes | Solid gray | Other scheduled tasks |
| Curved arrow | Dark gray with arrowhead | Movement indicator (from -> to) |
| Warning icon | Yellow/orange triangle | Indicates conflict or attention needed |

**Diff Visualization:**
- Shows before/after comparison for scenario planning
- Clear visual distinction between:
  - Original position (red hatched)
  - Proposed position (solid blue)
  - Unchanged tasks (gray)
- Movement path shown with curved arrow

---

## Design System Summary

### Color Palette

| Purpose | Color | Hex (Approximate) |
|---------|-------|-------------------|
| Primary Action | Blue | #2196F3 |
| Mechanical/Routine | Blue | #1976D2 |
| Electrical/Overhaul | Orange/Amber | #FF9800 |
| Capacity Bottleneck | Red | #F44336 |
| Conflict Indicator | Red | #E53935 |
| Success/On Track | Green | #4CAF50 |
| Background | White/Light Gray | #FFFFFF / #F5F5F5 |
| Text Primary | Dark Gray | #212121 |
| Text Secondary | Medium Gray | #757575 |
| Borders | Light Gray | #E0E0E0 |

### Heatmap Gradient

```
Low Density                            High Density
   |                                        |
   v                                        v
[Light Blue] -> [Yellow] -> [Orange] -> [Red/Dark Red]
```

### Typography

| Element | Style |
|---------|-------|
| App Title | Bold, ~18px |
| Section Headers | Bold, ~14px |
| KPI Values | Semi-bold, ~14px |
| Task Labels | Regular, ~12px |
| Axis Labels | Regular, ~11px |
| Tooltips | Regular, ~12px |

### Component Library (Inferred)

| Component | Usage |
|-----------|-------|
| Navbar | Fixed top, dark or white background |
| Cards | Task cards, modals |
| Buttons | Primary (blue), Secondary (gray) |
| Sliders | Range selection, time scrubber |
| Toggles | Boolean settings |
| Dropdowns | View selection, filters |
| Tags/Badges | Status indicators, KPIs |
| Tooltips | Hover details |
| Modals | Simulation setup, zoom details |

---

## Key Features Identified

### 1. Semantic Zoom (LOD System)
- **MACRO:** 12+ year heatmap view
- **MESO:** 2-year DNA strip pattern
- **MICRO:** 4-8 week detailed Gantt

### 2. What-If Simulation
- Scenario setup modal
- Constraint configuration (labor, date range)
- Infrastructure toggles
- Solver with estimated time

### 3. Scenario Comparison
- Diff view for before/after
- Visual indicators for moved tasks
- Conflict detection

### 4. Resource Management
- Pit occupancy tracking
- Capacity charts
- Conflict alerts

### 5. Task Dependencies
- Curved arrow connectors
- Visual dependency chains
- Grouped task campaigns

### 6. KPI Dashboard
- Fleet availability percentage
- Budget status
- Conflict alert count

### 7. Time Navigation
- Time scrubber at bottom
- Zoom level selector
- Date range controls

---

## Implementation Notes

### Canvas/WebGL Requirements
- Heatmap rendering with color gradients
- InstancedMesh for task blocks at MESO level
- HTML overlay for task cards at MICRO level
- Smooth transitions between LOD levels

### Interaction Patterns
- Pan: Drag to navigate
- Zoom: Scroll wheel / pinch
- Select: Click on task
- Hover: Show tooltip
- Double-click: Zoom in to next LOD level

### Data Visualization
- ~50 trains visible at once
- 10+ year time range
- ~60,000 tasks total
- Real-time conflict detection

---

## File Reference

| Image | Primary View | Key Features |
|-------|--------------|--------------|
| screen-1.png | Simulation Modal | Constraints, Solver button |
| screen-2.png | Dashboard + Zoom | Heatmap, 4-week zoom modal |
| screen-4.png | All 3 LOD levels | Macro/Meso/Micro comparison |
| screen-5.png | Meso View | DNA pattern, capacity chart |
| screen-6.png | Micro View | Gantt, pit occupancy, conflicts |
| screen-7.png | Diff View | Scenario comparison, movement |
| exemplo-mock.png | Same as screen-2 | (Duplicate) |

---

*End of Visual Specification Document*

## Key Features Identified

### 1. Semantic Zoom (LOD System)
- **MACRO:** 12+ year heatmap view
- **MESO:** 2-year DNA strip pattern
- **MICRO:** 4-8 week detailed Gantt

### 2. What-If Simulation
- Scenario setup modal
- Constraint configuration (labor, date range)
- Infrastructure toggles
- Solver with estimated time

### 3. Scenario Comparison
- Diff view for before/after
- Visual indicators for moved tasks
- Conflict detection

### 4. Resource Management
- Pit occupancy tracking
- Capacity charts
- Conflict alerts

### 5. Task Dependencies
- Curved arrow connectors
- Visual dependency chains
- Grouped task campaigns

### 6. KPI Dashboard
- Fleet availability percentage
- Budget status
- Conflict alert count

### 7. Time Navigation
- Time scrubber at bottom
- Zoom level selector
- Date range controls

---

## Implementation Notes

### Canvas/WebGL Requirements
- Heatmap rendering with color gradients
- InstancedMesh for task blocks at MESO level
- HTML overlay for task cards at MICRO level
- Smooth transitions between LOD levels

### Interaction Patterns
- Pan: Drag to navigate
- Zoom: Scroll wheel / pinch
- Select: Click on task
- Hover: Show tooltip
- Double-click: Zoom in to next LOD level

### Data Visualization
- ~50 trains visible at once
- 10+ year time range
- ~60,000 tasks total
- Real-time conflict detection

---

## File Reference

| Image | Primary View | Key Features |
|-------|--------------|--------------|
| screen-1.png | Simulation Modal | Constraints, Solver button |
| screen-2.png | Dashboard + Zoom | Heatmap, 4-week zoom modal |
| screen-4.png | All 3 LOD levels | Macro/Meso/Micro comparison |
| screen-5.png | Meso View | DNA pattern, capacity chart |
| screen-6.png | Micro View | Gantt, pit occupancy, conflicts |
| screen-7.png | Diff View | Scenario comparison, movement |
| exemplo-mock.png | Same as screen-2 | (Duplicate) |

---

*End of Visual Specification Document*

content.text:
O documento de especificacao visual foi criado com sucesso. Aqui esta um resumo do que foi documentado:

## Analise Visual Concluida

Foram analisados 7 mockups (6 unicos + 1 duplicado) da pasta `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/design/`:

### Imagens Analisadas

| Arquivo | Conteudo |
|---------|----------|
| **screen-1.png** | Modal de configuracao de simulacao (What-If) com slider de disponibilidade de mao-de-obra, seletor de datas e toggle de infraestrutura |
| **screen-2.png** | Dashboard principal com heatmap de manutencao e modal de zoom mostrando Gantt detalhado de 4 semanas |
| **screen-4.png** | Comparacao dos 3 niveis LOD (Macro/Meso/Micro) lado a lado |
| **screen-5.png** | Vista Meso (1-2 anos) com padrao diagonal "DNA" e grafico de capacidade |
| **screen-6.png** | Vista Micro (4-8 semanas) com Gantt detalhado, ocupacao de pits e indicadores de conflito |
| **screen-7.png** | Vista de comparacao de cenarios (Diff View) com marcadores de posicao original/nova |
| **exemplo-mock.png** | Duplicata da screen-2.png |

### Principais Padroes de UI Identificados

1. **Sistema de Semantic Zoom (LOD)**
   - MACRO: Heatmap 12+ anos (amarelo->laranja->vermelho)
   - MESO: Padrao "DNA Strip" 2 anos (blocos diagonais azul/laranja)
   - MICRO: Gantt detalhado 4-8 semanas (cards de tarefas)

2. **Componentes Chave**
   - Navbar com KPIs (Fleet Avail, Budget Status)
   - Time Scrubber na parte inferior
   - Painel de Ocupacao de Pits
   - Sistema de dependencias com setas curvas
   - Indicadores de conflito (circulo vermelho com !)

3. **Esquema de Cores**
   - Azul (#2196F3): Acoes primarias, manutencao mecanica
   - Laranja (#FF9800): Manutencao eletrica, overhauls
   - Vermelho (#F44336): Conflitos, gargalos de capacidade
   - Cinza: Tarefas padrao, elementos secundarios

4. **Recursos de Simulacao**
   - Modal de configuracao de cenario
   - Comparacao de cenarios com diff visual
   - Solver com tempo estimado

O documento completo foi salvo em:
`/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/system/_migration_memory/07_visual_spec.md`
